rows.name: --sf-animation-blink
rows.declared: sf-blink calc(1s * var(--sf-motion-scale)) steps(1, end) infinite

rows.name: --sf-body-color
rows.computed:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) clamp(0.05, calc(l - 0.4 - 0), 0.35) c h),
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260)       clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.25 + 0), 1)    c h)
      )
rows.shown:
light-dark(
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260) clamp(0.05, calc(l - 0.4 - 0), 0.35) c h),
        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260)       clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.25 + 0), 1)    c h)
      )
rows.darkComputed: oklch(from oklch(0.69 0.0225 260) clamp(0.70, calc(l + 0.25 + 0), 1)    c h)

        oklch(from oklch(0.52 0.025 260)       clamp(0.25, calc(l - 0.3),  0.55) 0.005 h)
      )

calc(1px * 1) solid light-dark(
